body: call detect_dosage_effect(ancestor, paralogs, n_paralogs, n_dims, filtered_paralogs_mask, n_mask_chunks, n_results, max_subset_size, work_arr_paralog_subsets, n_paralog_subsets, active_mask, temp_paralog_vector, ierr, max_angle, gain_gamma)
Call to detect_dosage_effect.description: Detects dosage effect of subsets of paralogs

Call to angle_between.description: Calculates the angle between two vectors in radians

Call to radians.description: Returns the degrees as radians, always positive

Call to norm.description: Calculates the euclidean norm of a vector
